mapper.sql: FROM biz_merchant m JOIN biz_merchant_category c ON c.id = m.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM biz_merchant_category WHERE code = #{code} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.enterprise_id, m.code, m.name, m.category_id, c.name AS type, m.location, m.address, m.bank, m.bank_card_num, m.channel, m.service_phone, m.default_area_code, m.updated_by, m.deleted AS is_delete
WHERE c.direction = 'UPSTREAM' AND m.deleted = 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM biz_merchant_area ma WHERE ma.merchant_id = m.id AND ma.area_code = #{areaCode} AND ma.deleted = 0)
